# Sprint 3.2 Staging Tables

**Sprint:** Sprint 3. Staging And Transformation Layer
**Objective:** Design and implement the staging and transformation layer, including transformation philosophy, staging tables, and data quality rules.

## Description
Design and implement staging tables, including flattening nested JSON, standardizing units of measure, and normalizing timestamps to UTC.

## Deliverable
Designed and implemented staging tables
